title: Section 58
content: 1[58. Exemption.--(1) The Central Government may, by notification, exempt any property relating to charitable or religious trusts from the operation of this Act. (2) Every notification issued under sub-section (1) shall be laid before each House of Parliament.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 43 of 2016, s. 10, for sections 7 and 8 (w.e.f. 1-11-2016).
